meta.defaultTitle: EVOTECH — Integrated software that runs your business
meta.description: EVOTECH Software: we build ERP, POS, mobile apps and smart solutions for businesses — high performance with a modern design.

hero.title: We build systems that run your business
hero.subtitle: From point-of-sale and restaurant management to delivery and accounting apps — we design and build reliable software that grows with your company.

servicesSection.title: Our services
servicesSection.subtitle: We cover the full software lifecycle — from idea to launch and support.

productsSection.title: Our products
productsSection.subtitle: Ready-made systems that power your business from day one.

why.title: Why EVOTECH?
why.subtitle: We balance engineering quality, user experience and on-time delivery.

items.title: Performance & reliability
items.description: Built on a modern, scalable architecture that handles growth without a rebuild.

items.title: Security first
items.description: Data protection, permissions and encryption are core to everything we build.

items.title: Modern design
items.description: Elegant, fast interfaces with Arabic & English and dark mode support.

items.title: Ongoing support
items.description: A team close to you for maintenance and continuous improvement after launch.

ctaBand.title: Ready to digitize your business?
ctaBand.subtitle: Book a free consultation and let us build the right solution for you.

servicesPage.title: Our services
servicesPage.subtitle: Comprehensive software solutions tailored to your business needs.

productsPage.title: Our products
productsPage.subtitle: Ready systems and apps that run your business efficiently.

pricingPage.title: Pricing plans
pricingPage.subtitle: Flexible plans for every business size — no hidden fees.
pricingPage.note: * Prices are placeholders for preview and will be updated later.

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.subtitle: A startup passionate about building software that makes a real difference.
aboutPage.mission: Empower businesses in the region to run their operations with reliable, easy and fairly-priced software.
aboutPage.vision: To be the central platform powering hundreds of products and thousands of companies across the region.

values.title: Craftsmanship
values.description: We write clean, maintainable code and never take shortcuts that hurt the future.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: Full clarity in pricing, timelines and communication with our clients.

values.title: Customer first
values.description: Our client's success is the true measure of ours.

contactPage.title: Contact us
contactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll get back within 24 hours.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Your message has been received. Thank you!

footer.tagline: Integrated software that runs your business, smarter.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: This is your EVOTECH dashboard for managing subscriptions, clients and products.

devices.title: App devices
devices.emptyPending: No pending requests — you're all caught up

delete.title: Delete this device?
delete.warnActive: This device currently has access. Deleting it locks the user out of the app immediately, with no message shown to them.
delete.warnTrial: This cannot be undone. If the app grants a free trial, deleting the row makes the device eligible for a new one the next time it registers.

decline.title: Decline this request?
decline.explain: The request is removed from the queue. Any subscription the device already has is untouched, and the customer can ask again from the app.

plans.title: App plans
plans.empty: No plans in this catalog yet
plans.readsSharedNotice: {app} currently sells the shared catalog. Plans you add here are not offered to its users until you switch it to its own catalog in settings.

form.keyHint: What the app sends back when a user picks this plan. Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores.
form.keyLocked: The key cannot be changed — devices already subscribed store it, and their renewals resolve by matching it.

delete.title: Delete this plan?
delete.warn: This cannot be undone. If any device is subscribed on this plan the deletion is refused — disable the plan instead, which hides it from the app while existing subscribers keep renewing normally.

app.title: {app} settings
app.label: Display name
app.labelHint: Used in push notifications, so users of this app are never asked to renew another one.
app.trialHint: 0 means no trial. Only granted once, the first time a device registers.
app.usesSharedHint: Uncheck to sell this app's own plans. With it unchecked and no plans configured, the app offers nothing.
